section.heading: National Merchant Mariner Medical Advisory Committee

subsection.heading: Establishment.—
subsection.content: There is established a National Merchant Mariner Medical Advisory Committee (in this section referred to as the “Committee”).

subsection.heading: Function.—
subsection.chapeau: The Committee shall advise the Secretary on matters relating to—

paragraph.content: medical certification determinations for the issuance of licenses, certification of registry, and merchant mariners’ documents with respect to merchant mariners;
medical standards and guidelines for the physical qualifications of operators of commercial vessels;

paragraph.heading: In general.—
paragraph.content: The Committee shall consist of 14 members appointed by the Secretary in accordance with this section and section 15109 of this chapter.

paragraph.heading: Expertise.—
paragraph.content: Each member of the Committee shall have particular expertise, knowledge, and experience in matters relating to the function of the Committee.

paragraph.heading: Representation.—
paragraph.chapeau: Members of the Committee shall be appointed as follows:

subparagraph.content: 9 shall represent health-care professionals and have particular expertise, knowledge, and experience regarding the medical examinations of merchant mariners or occupational medicine.
5 shall represent professional mariners and have particular expertise, knowledge, and experience in occupational requirements for mariners.
